name: Chicken with Bulgur Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet with an oven-proof lid, heat olive oil over high heat.
2. Add chicken breasts and brown lightly on both sides. Cook in batches if necessary, then reserve the chicken.
3. Add onions and cumin seeds to the skillet. Sauté, stirring until onions are lightly browned, about 2 minutes.
4. Stir in bulgur and toast it gently.
5. Pour in water, raisins, salt, and cinnamon. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove from heat and arrange chicken breasts on top of the bulgur in a single layer.
7. Cover tightly and place the skillet in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C). Bake for 20 minutes.
8. Garnish with toasted almonds before serving. Serves 6.
